description: Perform a 'List Mode' audit of the sitemap file located at /home/ga/Documents/SEO/sitemaps/draft_sitemap.xml using Screaming Frog SEO Spider to identify broken links. Export the crawl data to /home/ga/Documents/SEO/exports/sitemap_audit_data.csv. Generate a text report at /home/ga/Documents/SEO/reports/sitemap_remediation.txt listing the total number of URLs crawled, the counts for 200 OK, 3xx Redirects, 4xx Errors, and 5xx Server Errors, and the specific URLs that returned a 404 Not Found error.
